thoren.name: THOREN
thoren.tagline: Before Ramet learned to stabilize, and before Nexar learned to disrupt, Thoren wrote the rules they both think they understand.
thoren.philosophy: The coat is not a costume — it is a document. It contains encoded law.

connections.name: RAMET
connections.workflow: Ramet's stabilization agents receive the legal frameworks Thoren's agents produce.

connections.name: NEXAR
connections.workflow: Nexar's disruption agents challenge the compliance structures Thoren's agents build.

connections.name: LYRA
connections.workflow: Lyra's content architects build visibility for the systems Thoren's agents create.

ramet.name: RAMET
ramet.tagline: Nothing on this suit is symmetrical by accident — asymmetry IS the design principle for optimal field stabilization.
ramet.philosophy: The suit stabilizes before the destabilization event is apparent.

connections.name: THOREN
connections.workflow: Thoren's legal agents provide the foundational rules Ramet's agents enforce.

connections.name: NEXAR
connections.workflow: Nexar disrupts what Ramet stabilizes — their agents are in constant tension.

connections.name: KAIRO
connections.workflow: Kairo's precision agents execute the strategies Ramet's agents design.

nexar.name: NEXAR
nexar.tagline: Red channels follow fracture physics — not circuit light, bleed, not flow.
nexar.philosophy: The suit doesn't announce itself. It reveals itself when it's too late.

connections.name: RAMET
connections.workflow: Ramet stabilizes what Nexar's agents disrupt — opposing forces in balance.

connections.name: THOREN
connections.workflow: Nexar's innovation agents challenge the legal frameworks Thoren's agents maintain.

connections.name: NEFRA
connections.workflow: Nefra's resonance agents counterbalance Nexar's destabilization force.

lyra.name: LYRA
lyra.tagline: Gold orbit-line patterns forming architectural maps. She sees systems before they exist.
lyra.philosophy: She sees systems before they exist. The suit maps what hasn't been built yet.

connections.name: THOREN
connections.workflow: Thoren's legal agents provide compliance for the content systems Lyra architects.

connections.name: KAIRO
connections.workflow: Lyra's content architects design the strategies Kairo's agents execute with precision.

connections.name: HORUSEN
connections.workflow: Horusen's business agents translate Lyra's vision into revenue strategies.

kairo.name: KAIRO
kairo.tagline: Reactive scripts converge at wrist. Scalpel mode active. Every data stream, a targeted strike.
kairo.philosophy: Every data stream is a targeted strike. Precision is not caution — it is lethality focused.

connections.name: NEFRA
connections.workflow: Kairo cuts, Nefra dissolves. Together their agents cover the full precision spectrum.

connections.name: LYRA
connections.workflow: Kairo's precision agents execute the content strategies Lyra's agents architect.

connections.name: RAMET
connections.workflow: Ramet's stabilization agents support Kairo's high-precision operations.

nefra.name: NEFRA
nefra.tagline: Same protocol, different frequency. Where Kairo cuts with light, Nefra dissolves with resonance.
nefra.philosophy: Same protocol, different frequency. Resonance dissolves what precision cannot cut.

connections.name: KAIRO
connections.workflow: Nefra's resonance agents complement Kairo's precision for full spectrum coverage.

connections.name: NEXAR
connections.workflow: Nexar's chaos agents clash with Nefra's structured resonance approach.

connections.name: HORUSEN
connections.workflow: Horusen's ancient knowledge feeds Nefra's resonance frequency calibrations.

horusen.name: HORUSEN
horusen.tagline: Royal blue armor carries the weight of encoded hieroglyphic knowledge. Protection stream active.
horusen.philosophy: Before law, there was script. Before script, there was knowledge.

connections.name: THOREN
connections.workflow: Horusen's ancient agents predate Thoren's law — the foundational knowledge layer.

connections.name: LYRA
connections.workflow: Horusen's strategy agents provide the business depth Lyra's content agents surface.

connections.name: NEFRA
connections.workflow: Horusen's ancient protocols feed Nefra's resonance frequency calibrations.
